findings.description: s3 merges three h3 sub-sections (条件に紐付くデータの全件検索処理, 範囲指定での検索処理, 取得したSqlResultSetの使用方法) into a single knowledge section. The source h2 section 簡易検索機能 is well over 2000 chars and has three distinct h3 headings; per V3 rules this warrants splitting into separate sections.
findings.source_evidence: RST h3 headings: 条件に紐付くデータの全件検索処理 (==), 範囲指定での検索処理 (==), 取得したSqlResultSetの使用方法 (==)

findings.location: s3 — SQLファイルの記述ルール
findings.description: The SQL file rule 'コメント行は、空行とはならない' (comment lines do not count as blank-line separators between SQL groups) is omitted. This is a correctness constraint: a comment line placed between two SQL statements does not satisfy the required blank-line separation, which could cause runtime errors if misunderstood.
findings.source_evidence: Source footnote a): 'コメント行は、空行とはならない。'

findings.location: s3 — 大量データの定義
findings.description: The illustrative code examples from the footnote that clarify what constitutes 'large data' are omitted. Specifically, the counterintuitive case `statement.retrieve(10000000, 20)` being NOT large data (start position is irrelevant; only max-count matters) is only hinted at in prose but the concrete examples are absent.
findings.source_evidence: Source footnote: 'statement.retrieve(10000000, 20); // 取得開始位置は1千万であるが、取得最大件数に20件を指定しているため(SqlResultSetのサイズは最大で20件のため)、大量データの取得とはならない。'

findings.description: `getSqlPStatement` is a key API method used in every retrieval example but is absent from s3's hints array.
